overall.description: First-person perspective inside a futuristic metro train (NCART) from Cyberpunk 2077 traveling through Night City. The journey begins in daylight on elevated tracks, transitions through dark tunnels, and emerges into an underground section with vibrant neon signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic metro car interior with digital advertisements

events.description: sunlight streams through the side window creating bright patches on the wooden floor
camera pans right from interior view to focus on the side window showing passing urban buildings

agents.ego_description: sitting inside a moving metro train, observing the futuristic interior and the urban landscape passing by the window

entered.detail: row of four blue upholstered seats with metal armrests and dividers
illuminated advertisement panel displaying FIXER text with yellow and red graphics
green neon digital sign reading BELOW DECK with Japanese characters
large rectangular window showing passing city buildings and clear sky
light tan wood panel flooring with visible grain patterns
vertical brass-colored metal pole for standing passengers
vertical poster with red hand symbol and Japanese text on the interior wall

segments.scene_description: The segment opens inside a futuristic metro train with blue seats and digital advertisements overhead. Sunlight illuminates the wooden floor as the train moves through an elevated urban area. The camera slowly pans right, shifting focus from the interior seating to the side window revealing passing skyscrapers and city structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: metro train traveling through dark underground tunnel

events.description: train enters dark tunnel structure, all exterior natural light disappears leaving only interior illumination
train passes extremely close to tunnel wall, temporarily blocking the exterior view entirely

agents.ego_description: continuing to ride the metro as it transitions from the elevated city tracks into the dark underground tunnel system

entered.detail: dark concrete tunnel wall passing by closely outside the window
bright overhead fluorescent light illuminating the train cabin

segments.scene_description: The train enters a dark tunnel, plunging the exterior view into darkness while the interior remains lit by overhead fixtures. The camera faces the right side window showing the rough concrete tunnel walls passing by at close proximity. The digital displays and posters from the previous segment are no longer visible as the camera orientation shifts.

scene_state.functional_zone: underground metro tunnel with neon-lit advertisements

events.description: colorful neon signs and digital billboards become visible outside the window illuminating the tunnel
train passes multiple illuminated advertisements and building facades with vibrant neon lighting

agents.ego_description: riding through the underground section observing the colorful neon advertisements and city lights visible through the tunnel

entered.detail: illuminated advertisement featuring a pink palm tree graphic
building facade covered with multiple glowing neon signs and digital displays
large vertical digital screen showing colorful animated graphics

segments.scene_description: The train emerges from the dark tunnel section into an underground area filled with vibrant neon signage. Colorful advertisements, including a distinctive palm tree billboard, line the tunnel walls. The interior remains consistent with blue seats visible on the left, while the right window reveals a futuristic underground cityscape bathed in neon light.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement inside a futuristic metro train as it transitions from a sunlit elevated track into a dark tunnel and finally into a neon-lit underground hub. It begins within the cabin among blue seats and digital advertisements, with sunlight hitting the wooden floor as the camera pans right to reveal passing skyscrapers through the window. As the train enters a tunnel, the bright city view is abruptly replaced by the darkness of rough concrete walls rushing past in close proximity. The scene then shifts as the train emerges from the gloom into a vibrant underground section, where the exterior view transforms into a futuristic cityscape bathed in colorful neon signage and palm tree billboards.
